# Theme Tools

1 tool in this category.

### theme build (`theme_build`)

Build a theme_data JSON object from named parameters. Returns JSON to use with event/space create or update tools.

- **Backend:** local (none)
- **Surfaces:** aiTool
- **Destructive:** no

**Parameters:**
  - `preset` (string, optional) — Theme preset
  - `mode` (string, optional) — Color mode
  - `color` (string, optional) — Accent color
  - `shader` (string, optional) — Shader name (when preset is shader)
  - `pattern` (string, optional) — Pattern name (when preset is pattern)
  - `font_title` (string, optional) — Title font
  - `font_body` (string, optional) — Body font

---

## Related Tools

`theme_build`
